name: goanon-verify
description: GoAnon Verify — local-first privacy-preserving age proof engine and website verifier SDK

scripts.test: npm run build:test-engine && node --experimental-vm-modules test/engine.test.mjs && node test/verifier.test.mjs && node test/production-verifier.test.mjs && node test/docs-examples.test.mjs && node test/trust-anchor-config.test.mjs && node test/wallet-connector.test.mjs && node test/feature-flags.test.mjs
scripts.circuit:build: npm run circuit:compile && npm run circuit:setup && npm run circuit:export
scripts.circuit:setup: snarkjs groth16 setup circuits/age_verify.r1cs keys/pot15_final.ptau circuits/age_verify_0000.zkey && snarkjs zkey contribute circuits/age_verify_0000.zkey circuits/age_verify_final.zkey --name='goanon contribution'
scripts.circuit:export: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey circuits/age_verify_final.zkey circuits/verification_key.json
scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.build:test-engine: npx esbuild src/engine.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=test/.build/engine.mjs && npx esbuild src/wallet-connector.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=test/.build/wallet-connector.mjs && npx esbuild src/feature-flags.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=test/.build/feature-flags.mjs
